description:
![tomozaki_800.webp](https://img.2222.moe/images/2024/07/17/tomozaki_800.webp)  
  
弱角友崎同学 2nd Stage BDRip  
Jaku-Chara Tomozaki-kun 2nd Stage BDRip  
弱キャラ友崎くん 2nd Stage BDRip  
  
部分剧集内封评论音轨。  
Certain episodes contain commentary tracks.  
  
原盘的画质一般，制作水平与 S1 相同，依旧是 P9 的经典 720p PPT 风格，因此处理方法也基本沿用。由于原盘的编码质量比 S1 略差，我们加大了去色带的力度。我们的处理手段包括逆向拉伸重构、轻微抗锯齿、自适应去色带、补偿性锐化和自适应降噪。  
The image quality of the source is average, with a similar producing level as Season 1, the P9 classic 720p "PPT style". Therefore, the processing methods have largely been retained. Due to the poorer encoding quality of the source compared to Season 1, we intensified the de-banding. Our processing includes descaling and reconstruction, mild anti-aliasing, adaptive de-banding, compensatory sharpening, and adaptive denoising.

title: [LostYears] Date A Live - S05 (CR WEB-DL 1080p x264 AAC E-AC-3) (Japanese, English Dubs) [Dual-Audio, Multi-Sub] | Date A Live V (49-60, S5 - 01-12, Batch)
description:
![](https://iili.io/dIhNkX9.jpg)

---

**About**
A dual-audio remux of Crunchyroll WEB-DL video with the Japanese audio from Amazon, English dub from Crunchyroll, fansub from Sandalphon (including signs & songs subtitle tracks), all Crunchyroll subs, and named chapters.

**Video**
WEB-DL / x264 / 8 bit / 23.976 fps / 1080p / 8000 kbps / CR

**Audio**
#1 Japanese / Dolby Digital Plus (E-AC-3) / 2.0 / 48 kHz / 224 kbps / AMZN
#2 English Dub / Advanced Audio Codec Low Complexity (AAC LC) / 2.0 / 44.1 kHz / 128 kbps / CR

**Subtitles**
#1 English / Full / ASS / Sandalphon (modified)
#2 English / Forced / ASS / Sandalphon (modified)
#3 English / Full / ASS / CR
#4 English / Forced / ASS / CR
#5 English / SDH / SRT / CR
#6 Arabic (Saudi Arabia) / Full / ASS / CR
#7 French / Full / ASS / CR
#8 Italian / Full / ASS / CR
#9 Portuguese (Brazil) / Full / ASS / CR
#10 Russian / Full / ASS / CR
#11 Spanish (European) / Full / ASS / CR
#12 Spanish (Latin America) / Full / ASS / CR

**Chapters**
Named / Sandalphon

**Sources**
Video / Audio (English, CR) / Subtitles 3-12 / [VARYG](https://nyaa.si/user/varyg1001?f=0&c=0_0&q=Date+A+Live+DUAL)
Audio (Japanese, AMZN) / [NanDesuKa](https://nyaa.si/view/1838585)
Subtitles 1-2 / [Sandalphon](https://nyaa.si/view/1838343)

**Discord**
[LostYears](https://discord.gg/F43jMEjzwR)

**Notes**
English SDH subtitles weren't available for episodes 1 and 12.
Sandalphon's subtitles were modified to remove outdated gimmicks like Kanji song lyrics and group watermarks in the subs during the episode.
Sandalphon's edits to the Crunchyroll English subs include
-- restyled and slightly shrinked dialogue
-- restyled and retypeset signs
-- updated subtitle timing
-- honorifics and Japanese name order
-- OP/ED Romaji/English lyrics
-- naming and terminology changes in accordance with the fansubs of previous series (Doki/FFF/Kantai/Nii-sama)
-- minor text corrections
If you find any errors, please report them down in the comments or in the #public-qc-reports channel on our Discord.

[Use MPV](https://mpv.io/) | [Website](https://date-a-live5th-anime.com/) | [Twitter](https://twitter.com/date_a_info) | [Trailer](https://youtu.be/INI4lzxSvAg) | [Mediainfo](https://rentry.co/LostYears-Date-A-Live-V/raw)

title: [Milotic] Red Swan (화인가 스캔들) (2024) - S01E06 (WEB-DL 1080p DDP 5.1 h264 Disney+) [Multi-Subs] [2E23C22A]
description:

___

**Synopsis**

Red Swan tells the story of Oh Wan-soo, a woman born into a poor family, who turns her life around and becomes a world-class golfer, catching the attention of many, including her future husband, Kim Yong-guk, the heir to the Hwain Group. Struggling to pay off her mother's debts, Wan-soo agrees to marry Yong-guk, but soon becomes unhappy when she finds out about her husband's affair. For over a decade, she lives with her husband and is determined to make it work, but things begin to change quickly when she faces the biggest night of her life. Shortly after arriving in Manila for the first time as a Goodwill Ambassador, Wan-soo is caught in a gunfight, but narrowly escapes death thanks to the heroism of her company bodyguard, Seo Do-yoon. Soon after, Wan-soo develops feelings for Do-yoon and reflects on her life up until that night, but is unsure of what Do-yoon's true motivations are for working for the Hwan Group.

title: [Roro/Goruden/Odji-san] Vinland Saga Henshū - Films 1 à 7 (Saison 1 & 2) 1080p.MULTI.VFVOSTFR.x264
description:
# **[Goruden/Roro & Odji-san] Vinland Saga Henshû - Films 1 à 7**
#
![](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/fan-kai/images/7/78/Vinland_saga_henshu_affiche.png/revision/latest?cb=20230625141740&path-prefix=fr)


#
# **PRÉSENTATION**
**Vinland Saga Henshū** est une relecture de l'anime Vinland Saga qui se veut plus concise et plus conforme au manga original, et offrant un plus grand plaisir de visionnage. Les scènes HS sont coupées au maximum et certains passages sont remis dans le bon contexte afin d’obtenir une œuvre plus fidèle au manga.


# **SYNOPSIS**

Thorfinn est le fils de l'un des plus grands guerriers Vikings, mais quand son père est tué au combat par le chef mercenaire Askeladd, il jure de se venger. Thorfinn rejoint alors le groupe d'Askeladd pour le défier en duel. Cependant, il se retrouve pris au milieu d'une guerre pour la couronne d'Angleterre.

# **COMMENTAIRES**
Ce pack comprend les films 1 à 7 qui correspondent à la saison 1 et 2 de l'animé et des chapitres 1 à 99.
[Vous trouverez ici toute la correspondance entre les épisodes et chapitres de Vinland Saga.](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/Vinland_Saga_Hensh%C5%AB)

Pour plus d’informations, des news, réagir sur nos Kais, et pour regarder nos films en streaming, RDV sur [notre Discord !](https://discord.gg/WvRsF4J "discord link")

Nous réalisons également des versions Fan-Kai de nombreux autres animes, en VF et/ou VOST : Bleach, Black Clover, D.Gray-Man, Dragon Ball, Fairy Tail, Hunter x Hunter, My Hero Academia, Naruto, One Piece et bien d’autres à venir…

Les nfo et png font partie du pack plex disponible depuis notre Discord pour toutes nos séries en torrent, il permet de rentrer différentes métadonnées dans Jellyfin, Plex ou encore Kodi.
Pour l'utilisation de Plex avec ce pack, il faudra prendre le plugin "XBMCnfoTVImporter", le tuto pour installer le tout se trouve sur notre Discord également.

title: Inuyasha.Movie01.Affections.Touching.Across.Time.English.DualAudio.OPUS.1080p.BluRay.AV1-sagiriz
description:
source: https://nyaa.si/view/1722530

comparison: https://slow.pics/c/1bNyKC3C
I tweaked the denoise a lot compared to the first two seasons and it was an absolute nightmare to get good detail retention because this whole movie is effectively just noise but I think it turned out quite well. I tried my best to remove aliasing despite not diving very deep into this topic so please complain if I fucked it up.
As with the first two seasons I generated a custom av1 grain table to retain the look which again turned out a little less grainy.

I will release the rest of this series as soon as I find a source for the ITA-BD. Please let me know if you have it on hand.

title: [Odji-san] Made in Abyss Henshū - Films 1 à 6 1080p.MULTI.x264 [DUB][VO|VF] [Multiple Subtitle] [|FR|ESP]
description:
# **[Odji-san] Made in Abyss Henshû 01 à 06**
#
![](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/fan-kai/images/a/a7/Made_in_abyss_henshu_affiche.png/revision/latest?cb=20230815120506&path-prefix=fr)


#
# **PRÉSENTATION**
J'avais hâte de vous partager cette série dans sa version la plus fidèle au manga. Ce jour est enfin arrivé. Avant toutes choses, ne vous faites pas avoir par les dessins enfantins, Made in Abyss cache bien son jeu... Certaines scènes et sujets traités ne sont pas destinés à tous. Vous êtes averti... Il me tenait à cœur que mon premier projet soit un anime que j'affectionne tout particulièrement. Du mystère, de l'aventure, des personnages attachants et un univers coloré, c'est la recette parfaite pour que je passe un bon moment, si c'est votre cas aussi alors "Enjoy".
Il y a pour Made in Abyss 6 films qui reprennent les deux saisons ainsi que le film qui fait le lien entre les deux.

Le Manga étant toujours en cours de parution, il est fort possible que nous ayons à l'avenir le droit à la suite de l'adaptation animée. D'ici là, profitons de ce qu'on a.

# **SYNOPSIS**
Rico, apprentie cavernière, part pour sa première exploration en solo dans l'Abysse. Son but est de ramener le plus grand nombre de reliques, mais alors qu'elle sauve son ami d'une créature locale, elle va faire une rencontre surprenante.

# **COMMENTAIRES**
Ces 6 films couvrent la **saison 1**, **le film 3** (L'aurore de l'âme des profondeurs) et la **saison 2**.  Chapitres **01 à 60**, **T1 à T10** du manga
[Vous trouverez ici toute la correspondance entre les épisodes et chapitres de Made In Abyss.](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/Made_In_Abyss_Hensh%C5%AB?so=search)

Pour plus d’informations, des news, réagir sur nos Kais, et pour regarder nos films en streaming, RDV sur [notre Discord !](https://discord.gg/PkhuvA5Tgm "discord link")

Nous réalisons également des versions Fan-Kai de nombreux autre anime, en VF et/ou VOST : Bleach, Black Clover, D.Gray-Man, Dragon Ball, Fairy Tail, Hunter x Hunter, My Hero Academia, Naruto, One Piece et bien d’autres à venir…

**Описание:**
Масаки — бывшая участница популярной группы ньютуберов Harikiri Sisters. Всё у неё было прекрасно, пока её не уволили прямо в ходе стрима. Однако всё меняется, когда Масаки встречает Лайв — вампиршу со сверхспособностями, которая становится её напарницей. Вместе они собираются пилить крутейший контент и заполучить миллион подписчиков... Правда, у вампирши тут есть свой гастрономический интерес.

title: Creation.Of.The.Gods.I.Kingdom.Of.Storms.2024.VOSTFR.{EN.CH.SUBS}.Chinese.DL.E-AC3.2160p.WEB.H265-ZeroTwo
description:
![alt text](https://i.ibb.co/wwYn49k/creations.jpg "Logo Title Text 1")

___

# Creation of the Gods I : Kingdom of Storms




***

Remux perso :

Video : 

Creation.of.the.Gods.Kingdom.of.Storms.2024.German.DL.EAC3.1080p.WEB.H265-ZeroTwo

SUB FR :

trad provenant du blog billyboy2016

2 scènes post-génériques



___

Creation of the Gods est l'adaptation d'une des plus grandes légendes chinoises. 
Le Prince Yin Shou tente de monter sur le trône du royaume des Shang dans le sang avec l’aide de sa maîtresse Su Daji elle-même sous l'emprise du Démon Renard. 
Le sage taoïste Jiang Ziya descendu du Mont sacré Kunlun et Ji Fa, jeune guerrier élevé par Yin Shou, s’allient pour combattre le tyran.
.
.

C'est le premier volet d'une trilogie cinématographique adaptée du roman fantastique du XVIe siècle L'Investiture des dieux, écrit par l'auteur de la dynastie Ming Xu Zhonglin. La trilogie adapte également des récits plus anciens sur le même thème datant des époques Song et Yuan. Elle fut tournée simultanément et est à ce jour considérée comme le plus grand projet de film épique et mythologique chinois. Ce premier volet est sorti le 20 juillet 2023 en Chine.

L'histoire se déroule au Xe siècle av. J.-C. et le premier film raconte la version fantastique et fictive de l'ascension de Yin Shou, le dernier roi de la dynastie Shang. Les deux films suivants de la trilogie devraient sortir en 2024 et 2025, le deuxième film se concentrant sur la défense de Xiqi contre l'attaque des Shang, tandis que le troisième film présente la contre-attaque de Xiqi, sa victoire finale et l'établissement de la dynastie Zhou. 



___

title: Weekly K Manga Chapter Updates - Week 29 2024 (Digital) (Rillant)
description:
x1378 native rips obtained directly from [K Manga](https://kmanga.kodansha.com/). 
Spreads joined, otherwise untouched.

**Note:** I have picked up *Shimazaki in the Land of the Peace* starting with chapter 71. I will also continue doing *Old Knight - Bard Roehn* whenever the next part of chapter 77 is out. For *The Exiled Heavy Knight Knows How to Game the System* I'm just going to rip the chapters I can get with tickets throughout the week until caught up.

General info:
* "Why don't you rip X series? Chapter Y of series X already released, where is it?" These rips are purely the series I and JDS personally buy to read for ourselves as well as some series that have the second-most recent chapter available for free. That means that if a K Manga series is not included in these batches, we either don't buy/read it or it doesn't have recent free chapters.
* Batches are uploaded on Tuesday evening except for weeks when a Witch Hat Atelier chapter releases, then the upload is on Wednesday.
* For some series the title is so long that it exceeds the maximum path length, in this case (folder) names will be truncated. *(Example: the folder name for "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability" is simply "I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince.")*
* Previous batches can be found [here](https://nyaa.si/?f=0&c=3_1&q=weekly+k+manga+chapter+update).
* To search batches, use google with the following string: "site:nyaa.si weekly k manga {search query}". 
* If you want to add your purchases to these batches to share with others, let me know!
* For any questions or suggestions, leave a comment or message me on Discord.

title: [Bandai Namco]SPY×ANYA: Operation Memories Deluxe Edition
description:
![](https://morian.icu/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/EN_STEAM_SPYFAMILY_DX_StoreCapsule_main_616%C3%97353.jpg)
### https://store.steampowered.com/app/2170370/SPYxANYA_Operation_Memories
### Deluxe Edition includes:
• SPY×ANYA: Operation Memories
• Deluxe Outing Pack
– Thrilling Outfit Pack
– Excited Outfit Pack
– Anya’s Bond Dress and Bond Hat
• Deluxe Edition Bonus: Anya’s Director Chimera Hat

*Custom outfits will not be displayed during certain minigames and cutscenes.
*Some content included in the Deluxe Edition will be available for individual purchase. Please take care to not make duplicate purchases.
*Bonus content may be distributed at a later date.

### About this game:
Based on the popular anime & manga series! Anya Forger has received a new assignment from school: create a photo diary of memories.

On weekdays, head to class in the morning, then enjoy family time in the evening.

On weekends, visit all sorts of exciting places, like the beach or art museums, in search of subjects worthy of photographing!

What kind of photo diary will you help Anya create?

• Take pictures when Anya finds something interesting!
• There are many peculiar things that can catch Anya’s attention, like butterflies, swings, and fun sights during outings! Take great photos to complete her diary.
• There are a total of 10 outings to unique destinations for making memories!

SPY×ANYA also features over 15 minigames!
Enjoy over 15 minigames, including ones inspired by the anime series and those created originally for the game!
Fight to stay in sync with Yor’s special training, ride Bond as you play spy, and use Anya’s telepathic powers to read opponents’ cards in Tycoon.

Bring out your inner fashionista with rich customization!
Have fun dressing up Anya, Loid, Yor, and Bond in a wardrobe of over 80 unique outfits, accessories, and hairstyles!
Purchase outfits from the in-game store with points earned from minigames. Play to your heart’s content and unlock all kinds of clothes to wear on outings!

Spend time with your favorite characters based on the manga series!
In addition to Anya, Loid, Yor, and Bond; Damian and Becky from Eden College will also join the fun—not to mention Yor’s brother, Yuri, and WISE agent Nightfall!
Play at school together, get help with homework, and create countless precious memories with Anya’s friends and family.

### Support languages:
ja, en ,zh_cn, zh_tw, fr, de, es, po, kr, it

title: [Mocha] Ryza no Atelier [Web 1080p]
description:
MAL Summary: "From her hometown to her daily life on Kurken Island, everything surrounding Reisalin "Ryza" Stout is painfully ordinary. Despite being the daughter of a hardworking farmer, she would rather go on pretend adventures as she explores almost every corner of the island. However, the fact that it is against the local customs to venture off Kurken Island irritates her to no end.

One day, wishing for something interesting to finally happen in her life, Ryza escapes on a boat with her two good friends: the bookworm Tao Mongarten and the aspiring warrior Lent Marslink. Arriving at a nearby forest, the trio stumbles into Klaudia Valentz, the daughter of a visiting merchant who also wandered off into the woods.

As the naive and underprepared group ventures further, they run into dangerous monsters. Thankfully, they are rescued by the alchemist Empel Vollmer and his skilled bodyguard Lila Decyrus. This fateful encounter will lead Ryza to the key that will change her life forever—the creative and wonderful world of alchemy."

* * * *

We are finally able to offer the batch of fansubbed episodes of Ryza no Atelier. This is the second anime adaptation of the Atelier game franchise (with the first being Escha & Logy no Atelier: Tasogare no Sora no Renkinjutsushi).

When it aired it received no attention from the fansubbing community outside of memes and remarks about Ryza's thighs (some even nicknamed it "Thigh-za no Atelier"). While this was no surprise, after all Ryza's thighs ARE rather prominently displayed again and again, it did not seem to inspire fansubbers to tackle the series. However, that very fact DID serve as a catalyst for [Mocha] to give it attention as a slowsub.

In many ways, like other anime adaptations, this was a sort of advertisement. At the time it was released the 3rd installment of the game itself was released as well. The actual content in the cour is roughly the first half of the first installment, whose full name is "Atelier Ryza: Ever Darkness & the Secret Hideout." As far as the content of the anime goes, it seems it was pretty faithful to the source. The anime even included content released as special offerings and add-ons after the game was released (the special outfits featured in ep 07 being an example).

As regards the story line itself, it does seem that the anime was produced primarily for those already familiar with the game. Since the story really begins picking up in the second half of the first installment, one could easily feel that the anime itself was another example of a "slice of life"-style work. In the game when the second installment arrives, many of the bits and pieces foreshadowed in the first half suddenly acquire meaning and context, and one begins to see the overarching narrative.

In any event, many thanks to all those who worked on this slowsub and stuck to it through the end! All errors in the release are solely my own, and there is other work that could be made to improve the release, but if the BDs do in fact become available we will be able to address them in an eventual BD release. ^^

* * * *

Staff Listing:

Encode: Pikminiman
TL: Simulcast
TS: Angrevol
ED: Flower
Timer: Animorphs
Song TLC: Shadeseeker
KFX: Zahuczky
QC: Flower
Moral Support, TS pinch hitting, seeding help: Pyros
Distro: Zohead

Note that we try to create the releases optimized for mpv - other players may give odd playback results.

**Описание:**
Бог ветра Сил по ошибке убивает Такуми. В качестве извинений бог отправляет Такуми в мир Этелдия. Однако это малоприятное место, представляющее собой огромный лес, наполненный опасными монстрами... В лесу Такуми находит близнецов — мальчика и девочку. Он беспокоится о малышах, даёт им имена Аллен и Елена и решает заботиться о них. Вскоре оказывается, что дети не так просты и могут победить монстра голыми руками. Добравшись до города, новоиспечённый родитель решает зарегистрироваться в гильдии, чтобы заработать на жизнь. Он начинает свою жизнь как искатель приключений, одновременно заботясь о детях.

title: [4de] DEAD DEAD DEMONS DEDEDEDE DESTRUCTION - S01E07 (WEB 1080p) [Dual Audio]
description:
## What is this?
The CR release of this show has a nice script but it has weird technical issues-- Everything is timed to the dub audio and the script is *full* of linebreaks.
Also, all of the signs are hardsubbed. There are some seriously cool signs that only an official publisher would be able to do (the title cards/location names) and straight up Arial-with-stroke signs.

The script is fully retimed and ~~lightly~~ edited. [Here's a script comparison](https://www.diffchecker.com/gXNIF4zv/). The diff doesn't include all of the strange linebreaks that were removed.

All of the Arial signs were dehardsubbed, and the important ones were recreated in ASS.
We also included the dub and a signs track if that's what you're into.

We're planning to keep up with this show as long as CR's timing is distractingly bad.

[MediaInfo](https://pastebin.com/raw/qyykWaUL)

## Credits
Translation: Ocean Productions  
Editing/Timing/TS: Henry  
Encode: sgt  
Song TL: chron  
Lyrics: Ridley  
KFX: Zahuczky  
QC: Henry, sgt

title: Love Live! Superstar!! Liella! LIVE & FAN Meeting Tour ~Welcome to Yuigaoka!!~ [720p h.265]
description:
**All credit for subtitles and original files go to [Team ONIBE](https://onibe.moe) and their amazing team that brought the original TLs to us.**

Step back in time two years (can you believe it's only been two years?) and introduce yourselves to the 2nd generation of Liella! This was the first live event to feature Kumachan, Yabuchan, Nonchan, and Emorin. The live section only featured Gen 1, but Gen 2 joined for the antics during the talk session, giving the LoveLive! community an opportunity to get to know the newest members better. A smaller release than usual for ONIBE, but a very welcome one (and one I haven't seen yet).

This re-encode comes in about 1 GB less thanthe size of the 1080p re-encode at 3.1 GB, which itself is about 33% of the original size of the ONIBE release, but with minimal fidelity loss, weighing in at about 3.9 GB. For those of you that need even more storage space savings beyond the 1080p's reduction in size, this should help you all out.

Playback has been tested on the latest versions of VLC Media Player, MPV, and Haruna as of 7/15/24.

Please seed! Hit and runs only hurt others those who come after you.

title: [Esdra] Radiant Kaï Saison 1 - 1080p.MULTI.x264
description:
# **[Esdra] Radiant Kaï Saison 1**
#
![](https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/fan-kai/images/4/46/Radiant_kai_affiche.png/revision/latest?cb=20230506130143&path-prefix=fr)


#
# **PRÉSENTATION**
**Radiant Kaï** est une relecture de l'anime Radiant qui se veut plus concise et plus conforme au manga original, et offrant un plus grand plaisir de visionnage. Les scènes HS sont coupées au maximum et certains passages sont remis dans le bon contexte afin d’obtenir une œuvre plus fidèle au manga.

Radiant est un manga français (quocorico !) que j'affectionne particulièrement (j'achète tous les tomes). Alors quand j'ai appris que les japonais avaient acheté les droits pour une adaptation en animé, j'étais ravi.
Sauf que la douche fut froide quand j'ai découvert la saison 1, vidée de toute saveur et profondeur. 
J'ai donc entrepris de le kaier pour essayer de lui rendre justice, et peut-être, vous encouragez à le découvrir en manga à l'occasion (ça en vaut le coup !). 
J'ai choisi de faire un film par tome, de sorte d'avoir des courts films (1h en moyenne).
J'espère que ça vous plaira !

# **SYNOPSIS**
Les Némésis sont des monstres qui tombent du ciel. Ils sont agressifs et tuent juste avec un contact, mais certains survivent après avoir touché un Némésis : ce sont les sorciers. Ces individus infectés sont les seuls remparts face au Némésis, mais ils sont autant craints que les Némésis eux même.
Seth est un jeune sorcier désireux de trouver l'origine des Némésis pour mettre un terme à ce fléau. 
Son aventure va le conduire lui et ses amis aux quatre coins du Pharenos en évitant l'inquisition qui œuvrent contre les sorciers.

# **COMMENTAIRES**
Les quatre films couvrent la saison 1.
Film 1 : épisodes **01 à 06**, chapitre **01 à 04** du manga
Film 2 : épisodes **06 à 14** (sans le 9), chapitre **05 à 12** du manga
Film 3 : épisodes **14 à 16**, chapitre **13 à 20** du manga
Film 4 : épisodes **16 à 21**, chapitre **21 à 28** du manga

[Vous trouverez ici toute la correspondance entre les épisodes et chapitres de Radiant.](https://fan-kai.fandom.com/fr/wiki/Radiant_Ka%C3%AF)

Pour plus d’informations, des news, réagir sur nos Kais, et pour regarder nos films en streaming, RDV sur [notre Discord !](https://discord.gg/WvRsF4J "discord link")

Nous réalisons également des versions Fan-Kai de nombreux autres animes, en VF et/ou VOST : Bleach, Black Clover, D.Gray-Man, Dragon Ball, Fairy Tail, Hunter x Hunter, My Hero Academia, Naruto, One Piece et bien d’autres à venir…

## **INFOS UPLOAD**
Montage : Esdra
Langues :  ![alt text](http://img.streetprez.com/flag/jp_JP.png "Japanese") Japonais et ![alt text](http://img.streetprez.com/flag/fr_FR.png "French") Français   
Sous-titres :  ![alt text](http://img.streetprez.com/flag/fr_FR.png "French") Français (VOST ASS & SRT et VF ASS & SRT)
Durée : 1h17, 1h02, 41min, 50min
Format : MKV
Résolution : 1920x1080
Qualité vidéo (CRF) : 18
Bitrate audio : 265 kbps
